description: Set up an analytics environment for country data by creating a database named 'world_analytics' and a table 'country_indicators' with columns: id (INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY), CountryCode (CHAR(3) NOT NULL), CountryName (VARCHAR(100)), Population (INT), SurfaceArea (DECIMAL(12,2)), GNP (DECIMAL(12,2)), LifeExpectancy (DECIMAL(4,1)), PopulationDensity (DECIMAL(10,2)), and GNPPerCapita (DECIMAL(10,2)). Import data from '/home/ga/Documents/imports/country_indicators.csv' and establish a Foreign Key constraint on 'CountryCode' referencing 'world.country.Code'. Create deterministic functions 'fn_development_level' (returning 'High' if >= 10000, 'Medium' if >= 1000 and < 10000, 'Low' if < 1000 or NULL) and 'fn_density_category' (returning 'Dense' if >= 200, 'Moderate' if >= 50 and < 200, 'Sparse' if < 50 or NULL). Define a view 'v_country_analysis' that includes CountryCode, CountryName, Population, GNPPerCapita, PopulationDensity, and the results of both functions. Export the view results to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/country_analysis.csv'.
